patient_utterances: [Clinician asked: "It is good to see you again. How have you been?"] It is good to see you too. I have been good.
[Clinician asked: "Have anything changes to your medical history or social history since the last time I saw you?"] No. No changes.

naive.response_text: It's wonderful to hear that you're doing well and that there have been no changes in your medical or social history. I'm here if you ever have any concerns or questions you'd like to discuss. Please feel free to bring up anything that's on your mind—I'm here to help.

strong_prompt.response_text:
Thanks for sharing that you're doing well — it's great to hear that no changes in your medical or social history since our last visit. I’m glad you’re feeling good, but I want to make sure there’s nothing we need to address today. Is there anything specific you’ve been thinking about or any questions you’d like to ask?

I know that even if things seem stable, it’s important to check in on any ongoing concerns or questions you might have. If there’s anything that’s been on your mind, or if you’ve noticed any new symptoms or changes, now is a good time to bring them up. We can continue to monitor your health and stay proactive if anything comes up.

Please let me know if there’s anything you’d like to discuss today, or if you have any questions about your care. I’m here to support you and help address any concerns you may have.

framework_only.response_text:
It's good to see you again and hear that you've been doing well.

Let's plan to see each other again in the near future. In the meantime, if anything changes or if you have any new concerns, please don't hesitate to reach out.

structured_response.acknowledgment: It's good to see you again and hear that you've been doing well.
structured_response.follow_up_invitation: Let's plan to see each other again in the near future. In the meantime, if anything changes or if you have any new concerns, please don't hesitate to reach out.

retrieval_only.response_text:
Thank you for reaching out. It sounds like you're looking for some support and information regarding your health concerns.

I want to make sure I explained this clearly — can you tell me, in your own words, what we're going to do next and why?

Let's plan to see each other again in 4 weeks. In the meantime, if you have any new concerns or questions, please don't hesitate to reach out.

structured_response.acknowledgment: Thank you for reaching out. It sounds like you're looking for some support and information regarding your health concerns.
structured_response.teach_back_prompt: I want to make sure I explained this clearly — can you tell me, in your own words, what we're going to do next and why?
structured_response.follow_up_invitation: Let's plan to see each other again in 4 weeks. In the meantime, if you have any new concerns or questions, please don't hesitate to reach out.

full.response_text:
Thank you for reaching out. I understand you're here to discuss your concerns and we'll work together to address them.

I want to make sure I explained this clearly — can you tell me, in your own words, what we're going to do next and why?

Let's plan to see each other again soon. If anything changes or if you have new questions, please don't hesitate to reach out.

structured_response.acknowledgment: Thank you for reaching out. I understand you're here to discuss your concerns and we'll work together to address them.
